creator: dteske@vicor.com
text:
Vitaly Magerya <vmagerya@gmail.com> reported that "bsdconfig startup_rcvar" (Toggle Startup Services) was unable to toggle certain (seemingly random) services.

Attached is a new shar with new port Makefile and distinfo to bring in the latest version which fixes this bug.

Fix: Had to implement new API routines for supporting the "--item-help" instances of dialog(1) menus.

Patch attached with submission follows:
How-To-Repeat: First, install the port sysutils/bsdconfig, and then execute "bsdconfig startup_rcvar" and try to toggle services that are ON, off. Though not consistent, some services refuse to be disabled.
